retrieved_note: Pilot agent extraction from official public pages and the Jan-Jun 2026 HBL Schedule of Bank Charges. Normalize before shipping to UI.

notes: Salaried age cap appears to be 60; self-employed appears to extend to 65.

HBL Prestige members publicly receive a 50% Platinum annual-fee waiver, but the base card requirement record keeps the standard fee.

HBL uses HBL DebitCard as an umbrella label on overview pages and HBL Classic DebitCard as the concrete product page.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: HBL's Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC says Mastercard Business Classic issuance and annual fee are 100% waived.

notes: Public page confirms it is a distinct business debit-card product for new and existing customers.
Public page surfaced product limits but not a clean fee or age table.
The Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC explicitly waives issuance and annual fee for Mastercard Business Classic.
Minimum account balance of PKR 40,000 is the linked HBL Conventional Current Account monthly average balance requirement per the official account page.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: HBL's Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC says Mastercard Business World issuance is 100% waived and annual fee is charged at 50% of the standard schedule amount.

notes: Public page confirms it is a distinct world business debit-card product for new and existing customers.
Public page surfaced product limits but not a clean fee or age table.
HBL Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC lists Mastercard Business World annual fee at Rs. 22,000 before the public business-customer waiver note.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: For qualified HBL Premium customers, the Jan-Jun 2026 addendum waives issuance and annual fee 100% in year 1 and gives a 50% annual-fee waiver from year 2 onward for the Master World Debit Card.

notes: Public page positions it for high-net-worth customers.
Limit enhancement PDF shows daily withdrawal PKR 500,000 and purchase/e-commerce / funds-transfer limits of PKR 3,000,000.
HBL Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC lists Mastercard World annual fee at Rs. 20,000.
A separate HBL Premium addendum publicly discloses a relationship-based fee waiver for qualified Premium customers.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Free issuance, renewal, and replacement for HBL Prestige members.

notes: Exclusive to HBL Prestige members.
Prestige eligibility requires a conventional current account quarterly average of PKR 5,000,000 (or equivalent foreign currency).
Issued instantly from Prestige lounges according to the public page.
Limit enhancement PDF shows daily withdrawal PKR 1,000,000 and purchase/e-commerce / funds-transfer limits of PKR 5,000,000.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: For HBL Nisa Plus Current and HBL Nisa Savings customers, issuance of the chosen HBL Classic (Master) or HBL Gold (Master) debit card is waived in the first year; subsequent annual fees apply according to card type as per the latest SOBC.

notes: Women-only debit proposition.
Current public account and SOBC documents surface first-year issuance waivers for Nisa-linked Classic or Gold Mastercard debit issuance, but do not publish a separate standalone Nisa-card fee table.
No publicly disclosed salary or card-specific balance threshold was surfaced.
HBL's Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC lists Mastercard Titanium annual fee at PKR 3,000.

No public salary threshold was found.
Minimum account balance of PKR 40,000 is the linked HBL Conventional Current Account monthly average balance requirement per the official account page.

gaps: Most HBL debit-card pages still do not expose clean public age or card-specific balance thresholds.
